About: It is about a competitive blood sport.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with the aristocracy.
ConsistsOf: It consists of throwing live foxes and other animals high into the air.
HasA: It has slings with a person on each end.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by being hazardous for the people launching the animals.
IsA: It is a competitive blood sport.
OccurredDuring: It occurred during the 17th and 18th centuries.
OccurredIn: It occurred in parts of Europe.
PerformedBy: It was performed by members of the aristocracy.
It was performed by mixed couples.
It was performed by Augustus II the Strong.
It was performed by the Swedish envoy Esaias Pufendorf.
It was performed by Holy Roman Emperor Leopold I.
It was performed by gentlemen dressed as mythical heroes.
It was performed by gentlemen dressed as Roman warriors.
It was performed by gentlemen dressed as satyrs.
It was performed by gentlemen dressed as centaurs.
It was performed by gentlemen dressed as jesters.
UsedIn: It is used in an enclosed patch of ground.
It is used in a courtyard.
It is used in an arena.
It is used in a castle courtyard.
It is used in a palace courtyard.
UsedTo: It is used to catapult the animal upwards.
